arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd consider Ten Hag replacement; PSG ready Yamal bid
arts.sum: Manchester City are ready to rival Arsenal and Liverpool for the signature of Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi as they look for a replacement for the injured Rodri . If Mohamed Salah leaves next summer, Liverpool will try to replace him with Real Madrid winger Rodrygo .

arts.ttl: PSG’s Désiré Doué unlikely to recover in time to face Arsenal, Vitinha’s fitness also a concern
arts.sum: Désiré Doué (19) is guaranteed to miss Paris Saint-Germain’s fixture against Stade Rennais on Friday and L’Équipe understands that it would be a surprise to see the Frenchman involved against Arsenal next…

arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are expected to be missing three players for their Matchday 2 clash in the UEFA Champions League against Arsenal. However, the Gunners will also be without a crucial player for this game. Norway’s team doctor had initially estimated that Martin Ødegaard would require at least three weeks to recover from an ankle injury, […] The post Arsenal Star Provides Injury Update After Being Ruled Out for Champions League Match vs. PSG appeared first on PSG Talk.

Victor Osimhen ’s agent has claimed that “someone made a mistake” in the summer such that the Nigeria international wound up at Galatasaray on loan from Napoli and not at Chelsea or PSG . Osimhen was linked with a big-money move from the Serie A club to Chelsea or PSG, yet he finds himself in Turkey until at least January and potentially until the end of the season.
